title: melinis microstachya
intro: Melinis microstachya, also known as the finger grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Melinis microstachya include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Melinis microstachya can be found in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
